description: Search Apartments.com listings, sync results to a local SQLite store, and run workflows the website never built — diff saved searches, rank by $/sqft, compare shortlists, and surface price drops or phantom listings.

tools.name: listing_get
tools.description: Fetch one Apartments.com listing detail page and parse schema.org microdata. Required: property_id (default: example-property).

tools.name: rentals_find
tools.description: Run a path-slug search at apartments.com and return listing placards parsed from the HTML response. Required: city (default: austin), state (default: tx).

params.name: city
params.description: City slug (lowercase, hyphenated). Example: austin, new-york, san-francisco.

params.name: state
params.description: Two-letter state abbreviation (lowercase). Example: tx, ny, ca.
